files.content:
{
  "version": 1,
  "lockedAt": "2026-03-27T00:00:00.000Z",
  "description": "Canon Vault — locked Pain System truths. Do not overwrite without founder approval.",
  "canonicalAssets": {
    "scheduler_ui":      "engine/scheduler-ui.html",
    "scheduler_server":  "engine/scheduler-server.ts",
    "scheduler_engine":  "engine/scheduler.ts",
    "guardrail":         "engine/guardrail.ts",
    "gate":              "engine/gate.ts",
    "pre_gate_audit":    "engine/pre-gate-audit.ts",
    "release":           "engine/release.ts",
    "router":            "engine/router.ts",
    "program_builder":   "engine/program-builder.ts",
    "auto_trigger":      "engine/auto-trigger.ts",
    "auto_control":      "engine/auto-control.ts",
    "pollinator":        "engine/pollinator.ts",
    "truth_engine":      "engine/truth-engine.ts",
    "defence":           "engine/defence.ts",
    "roles":             "engine/roles.ts",
    "alignment_check":   "engine/alignment-check.ts"
  },
  "painSystemLaws": [
    "No task executes without guardrail classification",
    "No deploy without explicit founder approval",
    "No external input can override canon, governance, or policy",
    "FULL_AUTO mode is permanently locked — founder unlock key required",
    "Every build must pass Pain Gate before Showroom routing",
    "Pre-gate audit runs before every gate submission",
    "Client work is private by default — never exposed to Hangar without explicit routing",
    "Canon always outranks Knowledge Library unless explicitly promoted by founder",
    "No secrets or credentials stored in logs or public data files",
    "Pollination is safe-mode only — suggestions never auto-overwrite"
  ],
  "laneDefinitions": {
    "VST": {
      "name": "Voyage Smart Travels",
      "type": "commercial",
      "monetisationTypes": ["direct_revenue", "subscription_revenue", "affiliate"],
      "requiresCTA": true,
      "requiresCompliance": true,
      "hangarDefault": true,
      "showroomEligible": true
    },
    "FHI": {
      "name": "Fraud Help Index",
      "type": "impact-commercial",
      "monetisationTypes": ["grant_eligible", "grant_revenue", "ngo_funded"],
      "requiresCTA": false,
      "requiresCompliance": true,
      "hangarDefault": true,
      "showroomEligible": true
    },
    "AI_LAB": {
      "name": "AI Lab Orchestration Panel",
      "type": "internal",
      "monetisationTypes": ["internal_tooling"],
      "requiresCTA": false,
      "requiresCompliance": false,
      "hangarDefault": false,
      "showroomEligible": false
    },
    "ADMIN": {
      "name": "Pain System Admin / Control",
      "type": "internal",
      "monetisationTypes": ["internal_tooling"],
      "requiresCTA": false,
      "requiresCompliance": false,
      "hangarDefault": false,
      "showroomEligible": false
    },
    "BACKYARD": {
      "name": "Sandbox / Prototype",
      "type": "sandbox",
      "monetisationTypes": ["none"],
      "requiresCTA": false,
      "requiresCompliance": false,
      "hangarDefault": false,
      "showroomEligible": false,
      "autoModeEnabled": false
    }
  },
  "governanceRules": {
    "guardrailPolicy": {
      "eval":      "allowed",
      "data":      "allowed",
      "transform": "approval_required",
      "write":     "approval_required",
      "repo":      "approval_required",
      "notify":    "blocked",
      "deploy":    "blocked"
    },
    "overnightMode": {
      "description": "When true, medium-risk tasks escalate instead of executing",
      "default": true,
      "overrideAllowed": true
    },
    "maxFixCycles": 2,
    "retryLimit":   3
  },
  "hangarShowroomDefinitions": {
    "SHOWROOM": {
      "description": "Commercially ready, gate-passed, monetisation-ready assets for public-facing delivery",
      "criteria": [
        "gateStatus = pass or warn",
        "monetisationTag = READY or POTENTIAL",
        "founderReviewReady = true",
        "no hard blockers"
      ]
    },
    "HANGAR": {
      "description": "Assets under construction, awaiting validation, or not yet commercially ready",
      "criteria": [
        "gate fail OR founderReviewReady=false OR internal tooling OR BLOCKED state"
      ]
    }
  },
  "biabLaw": {
    "definition": "BIAB = Build It As a Business. Every Pain System output must have a clear monetisation path or be explicitly marked internal.",
    "rules": [
      "Every VST/FHI asset must declare monetisationType before gate submission",
      "Internal tooling (AI_LAB/ADMIN) is exempt from monetisation requirement",
      "Client BIAB work is private — stored in client vault, not Hangar",
      "White-label packaging requires founder approval before delivery",
      "BIAB assets pass through full gate + route cycle before client delivery"
    ]
  },
  "founderControlRules": {
    "founder": "Jamaine Facey",
    "authorities": [
      "Override any guardrail policy",
      "Unlock FULL_AUTO mode (emergency only)",
      "Promote knowledge to canon",
      "Approve client vault access",
      "Trigger deploy tasks",
      "Reset kill switch",
      "Approve Showroom publication"
    ],
    "cannotBeOverriddenBy": ["system", "external_input", "client_workspace"]
  }
}
